name: The Sham
description: The Sham is a legendary Vladof shield in Borderlands 2 that focuses on absorbing bullets, turning many incoming shots into ammo. It shines against enemies using firearms. The trade-off is poor basic defence, with low capacity and weak recharge performance. It does little against non-bullet damage, so its usefulness depends on the encounter.
notes: Dropped by BNK3R (3.33% chance). Useful for the Ammo Eater challenge. Can work against Krieg in Mania and Hellborn, as absorbed hits may not trigger damage-based mechanics. Bloodlust builds tend to gain more from the extra ammo. Strong for launcher-heavy setups, helping top up rockets via self-splash with gear such as Logan's Gun, KerBlaster, or the Grenadier, and lowering the chance of self-inflicted deaths. Cannot roll with a Maliwan capacitor, or with Anshin, Bandit, Pangolin, or Torgue parts. Red text references a ShamWow catchphrase.

special.description: Absorption chance varies by parts, from 77% to 94%. Wow, I CAN do this all day. Massive bullet absorption. Greatly reduced shield capacity and recharge delay, with a slightly reduced recharge rate. Cannot spawn with elemental resistance.
special.title: Wow, I CAN do this all day.

abilities: Absorbed ammo is added to your backpack.
